purpose: Implements the WinUtil helpers. Utf8ToWide does a strict MultiByteToWideChar(CP_UTF8, MB_ERR_INVALID_CHARS) and falls back to CP_ACP for input that is not valid UTF-8; WideToUtf8 round-trips back. GetModuleDirectory resolves the calling DLL's directory by growing the buffer until GetModuleFileNameW fits. ReadUtf8FileAsWide slurps a file via std::ifstream and converts; WriteUtf8File uses _wfopen_s+fwrite. CombinePath wraps Shlwapi PathAppendW. PathToFileUri wraps Shlwapi UrlCreateFromPathW with the two-pass length probe.
invariants: Utf8ToWide preserves the size by passing static_cast<int>(text.size()) (no null terminator), then sizes the wstring to the conversion result exactly.
WriteUtf8File returns true only if the entire byte buffer was written and ferror is clear.
PathToFileUri uses the two-pass UrlCreateFromPath idiom (probe with E_POINTER for required length, then call again with the buffer) - the probe must return E_POINTER for the call to succeed.
gotchas: CombinePath uses a stack buffer of MAX_PATH (260) wide chars - longer combined paths get truncated silently. For full long-path support this would need the \\?\ prefix and a larger buffer.

Utf8ToWide silently falls back to CP_ACP for invalid UTF-8 input; this means file contents declared UTF-8 but actually CP1252 will be read as CP1252 rather than failing - intentional tolerance for older Notepad++ buffers.
